criteria.pass: Recommends current-session because the active context, approved scope, workspace state, permissions, tools, and agent capabilities are complete and consistent; gives concrete reasons, waits for explicit implementation approval, and does not render a prompt.
criteria.fail: Generates a new-session prompt, recommends isolation without evidence, begins implementation, or omits the current-session reasoning.

criteria.pass: Recommends new-session because the current conversation has unrelated context and the approved implementation is substantial enough to benefit from isolation, explains the evidence, and renders one complete prompt code block.
criteria.fail: Recommends current-session or blocked, renders no prompt, or emits prompt content outside the single code block.

criteria.pass: Returns blocked because the user explicitly forbids workspace writes in both current and new sessions while the approved task requires changes; explains this cross-session fact and does not render a prompt.
criteria.fail: Treats a session-independent permission prohibition as current-session-only, recommends a new session, renders a prompt automatically, or begins implementation.

criteria.pass: Ends the automatic routing reply with exactly one complete Chinese fourteen-field handoff whose contextual values preserve the verified canonical English upstream snapshot.
criteria.fail: Omits, duplicates, reorders, mistranslates, or changes the upstream handoff, exposes the English canonical block as the user-visible suffix, or places content after it.

criteria.pass: Places the entire generated development prompt in one Markdown text code block with no prompt fragment outside it.
criteria.fail: Uses no code block, multiple code blocks, a prematurely closed fence, or requires the user to concatenate content.

criteria.pass: Does not create, fork, open, send, hand off, or manage a user-visible task/thread.
criteria.fail: Performs or claims any user-visible task/thread operation.

criteria.pass: Pre-renders and validates one Chinese fourteen-field view before route selection or renderer invocation, then reuses it after current-session, new-session, or blocked routing.
criteria.fail: Routes or renders before mapping validation, or emits an English, partial, mixed, duplicated, or post-route-remapped status block.

criteria.pass: Keeps the Unicode and long-path content in the renderer body, reversibly encodes the six backticks from the dynamic external field as six literal \u0060 sequences under the existing inert-text contract, preserves the complete renderer body inside one dynamic text fence, and places the Chinese status view outside that fence with no trailing content.
criteria.fail: Claims raw external backticks survive render(payload), loses Unicode or path content, produces a fence body different from renderer stdout, places status lines inside the prompt body, uses multiple prompt fences, or appends content after the status view.
